SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.queue

Class RelayQueueService

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.queue.RelayQueueService
public class RelayQueueService extends Object
Queue runtime that continuously dispatches ready work and periodically releases expired claims.
